title: Create Lead
content:
US-001 — Create Lead
Module: Lead Management
Tags: regression, smoke, lead
Priority: High
Description:
Verify that a Sales Representative can create a new Lead by providing the required prospect information and that the system applies the correct default status.
Acceptance Criteria:
User should be able to navigate to the Leads tab.
User should be able to click on the "New" button.
User should be able to enter Lead details.
User should be able to provide Last Name as a mandatory field.
User should be able to provide Company as a mandatory field.
User should be able to click on the "Save" button.
User should be able to create a Lead successfully when all mandatory fields are populated.
User should see a validation error when Last Name is left blank.
User should see a validation error when Company is left blank.
User should see Lead Status automatically populated as "Open - Not Contacted" after Lead creation.
User should be redirected to the newly created Lead record page after successful save.
Test Data:
Environment:
https://login.salesforce.com/
Username:
shubham.bhele@qtsolv.com
Password:
Admin@1234
Lead Data:
First Name: John
Last Name: Smith
Company: ABC Technologies
Phone: 9989876789
Email: john.smith@example.com
Lead Source: Web
Expected Default Status:
Open - Not Contacted
